title: Job Opening Teacher at Sri Chaitanya

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at Sri Chaitanya
jsonLd.description:
Join the Sri Chaitanya family as a Teacher in Chandigarh. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Sri Chaitanya:
Sri Chaitanya is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sri Chaitanya!
